violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloth left on table at kitchen prep table. Did not have a sani bucket made/ready to use. -Bartender/server stated she replaces table top cloth about every 3 hours. *Cloth should be replaced every 2 hours or less or if visibly soiled OR store in sanitizer solution between uses. -Facility is using a Melaleuca all purpose cleaner at bar top and table tops. *Should be using a food safe sanitizer, not an all purpose cleaner.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 140F to 70F or below within two hours. -Soup made this morning found with temp of 58F-76F in a tightly covered plastic container. *Poured into a metal pan and returned to refrigeration loosely covered. After discussion with staff who made soup-directed her to have soup disposed of/removed from service

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not located properly or not used in the required manner. -Pepsi coolers have a thermometer at back upper area of unit. *Should be placed at "worst" case location - for these coolers thermometers should be at the bottom front of unit.--Temperature measuring device was not provided. -No thermometer in bar cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Spill at interior bottom surface of tall warmer. -Heavy dust/debris at walk in cooler fans. Some residue at ceiling and corner of walk in cooler.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
